mnemonics: FLEXIBLE DATA WAREHOUSE: Future Logic is Evolving, Xpect Layout Evolution - Data Adapts, Warehouse Houses Ongoing New Attributes, Always Changing Totally
keyPoints: Requirements are often incomplete or unclear at the start of the project.
The data warehouse design must be flexible and adaptable to changing needs.
An iterative development approach is more effective than a rigid, linear one.
commonMistakes: Designing a rigid schema that cannot accommodate new data sources or business questions.
Assuming all reporting needs and data sources are known upfront.
Failing to involve end-users in an ongoing process to refine requirements.
